verification.server_semantics_test_command: npm test -- tests/server/user-auth.test.ts -- --testNamePattern="marks only admin with password 123456 as requiring a credential change"

findings: Account settings now re-checks the current user after successful credential changes.
When requiresCredentialChange becomes false, the in-page guidance hides and the default-credentials route reason is removed.
Server tests confirm that changing the default password or username clears requiresCredentialChange.
non_claims: does not prove a real local account was mutated during this run
does not enforce server-side mandatory password change
does not grant accepted, integrated, or production_ready status
